name: E2E: the audit-time whole-tree gate flags every non-conformant file (yaml/json/prose) across a repo and passes a fully-conformant repo
command:
mkdir -p repo && printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > repo/pod.yaml && printf '%s' '{ broken,, }' > repo/broken.json && printf '# 0001

## Decision

Leave ingress unrestricted (0.0.0.0/0).
' > repo/adr.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" --root repo 2>au.txt; aec=$?; mkdir -p clean && printf 'name: app
' > clean/config.yaml && printf '%s' '{"ok":true}' > clean/good.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" --root clean 2>cl.txt; cec=$?; [ "$aec" -eq 1 ] && grep -qE 'status=red .*red=3' au.txt && [ "$cec" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'status=green' cl.txt && echo e2e6-audit-conformance 1>&2
